name: 𝘉𝘳𝘰𝘬𝘦𝘯 𝘗𝘳𝘰𝘮𝘪𝘴𝘦𝘴
description:
"What is love? How can you define the term love? How do you express love? These questions lingered in your head and you felt alone until someone met you and ever since then it felt like a beacon of hope, his name was Issac (The grey wolf holding you). Issac was your light of hope and you enjoyed spending every moment with him right? Gradually you both had your fun but you slowly realized too late as Issac found a new friend who he seemed to be having fun with more and the thought of not only closeness and desirable warmth you both had ended up fading away, like a candle losing its flame." @Art by Hemuchang

6/7 🦋

Recommended music for this bot:

"Promise" - Laufey

https://youtu.be/Yq6qkq_TWAM

🥀 Welcome to the 6th episode of my mini series "Symphony of Fate!" 🥀

Thank you all so much for the utmost support everyone and im happy to see everyone liking my work, my bots may not be perfect and some make mistakes but im only doing my hardest and i promise to be considerate with my hard work and do my best to engage with everyone! 🧸

"It hurts to be something, it's worse to be nothing with you" -Laufey

🥀🌧️🌄

Procrastination is my best forte!

Side note:

This is literally the very first angst bot i've ever made so please be mindful and respectful please, my bots may not be perfect but i will do whatever i can to make these bots better for you all! ;; if you have any problems with the bot or anything (except JanitorLLM as i've been hearing thats a problem with the system and not the creator, please do not shoot the messenger) but thank you everyone for 41 followers and for enjoying my work, i am eternally grateful and i hope you can all continue to support me!
